arts.ttl: Arsenal’s transfer window woes continue; no deal for versatile 28-year-old
arts.sum: It’s been a tough January transfer window for Mikel Arteta and Arsenal and it’s not getting any better thanks to no bids being received for one out-of-favour ace. Former Arsenal manager, Unai Emery, is set to hijack a move for Matheus Cunha, whilst Fabrizio Romano has noted Man United want a highly-rated Arsenal defender who […] The post Arsenal’s transfer window woes continue; no deal for versatile 28-year-old appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal facing Chido Obi-Martin repeat as wonderkid, 18, is spotted at Man Utd game
arts.sum: Arsenal could wave goodbye to a promising youth prospect as Manchester United look to tempt yet another Gunners wonderkid to Old Trafford just months after signing Chido Obi-Martin

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'working on' imminent January transfer for record-breaking goalscorer
arts.sum: Arsenal are in dire need of a new forward behind the end of the January transfer window and look to be progressing in their attempts to sign a major target after a Mikel Arteta appeal

arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal head to Wolves in the Premier League this weekend with three points the sole objective. The Gunners lost ground on leaders Liverpool last weekend after blowing a two-goal lead to draw with Aston Villa.
